title: Tributes to Karlie Sone after suspected murder in Ipswich
description: Her family says her death "leaves an unfillable void in all of our hearts".
content:
A woman whose death is being treated as murder was an "amazing loving mummy", her family has said.
Karlie Sone, 28, was found unresponsive after police were called to Russett Road, Ipswich, at 01:10 GMT on Tuesday, over concerns for her welfare. She ... [954 chars]

title: SNP wants to ban US from Scottish bases
description: Swinney pledges constitutional veto on countries ‘engaged in illegal wars’ after independence
content:
John Swinney has pledged to ban the United States military from an independent Scotland if it is engaged in an illegal war.
The SNP First Minister said that any foreign power “engaged in illegal conflicts” would be prevented from using Scotland’s air... [2859 chars]

title: Trump plots ‘disaster’ move into oil trading
description: Potential intervention comes as White House feels pressure to lower cost of brent crude from $100
content:
The Trump administration is considering intervening in oil markets to push down prices, despite warnings that it would risk a “biblical disaster”.
